daily.today_energy: Your emotional intuition is hitting different today. Trust that gut feeling telling you to slow down and actually process what's been happening. The universe is giving you permission to be soft.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether it's deepening an existing connection or getting clarity on what you actually want, today brings honest conversations. Stay open.
daily.career: Your creative ideas have serious potential right now. Don't dim them down just because they feel different. Share that proposal, suggest that thing—your perspective is exactly what's needed.
daily.health: Your nervous system could use some TLC. Try that grounding thing you've been meaning to do—tea, a walk, journaling, whatever helps you feel anchored. Small rituals > forcing yourself.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to trust your gut instincts, Cancer. There's a subtle shift in your energy that's asking you to release what no longer serves you. You're entering a phase where your emotional intelligence becomes your superpower.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your love language right now. Single? Someone's been noticing you from afar. Either way, don't be afraid to show up authentically. Real connections happen when you're genuinely you.
weekly.career: Your intuition about that project or opportunity is spot-on. Trust it. This isn't the week to play small or second-guess yourself. Your contributions matter more than you realize, and people are paying attention.
weekly.health: Your nervous system is asking for some TLC. Prioritize rest over productivity this week. Whether that's early nights, meditation, or just saying no to extra plans, honoring your need for peace will pay dividends.
